heroLead: Tabby keeps you company while you browse. Pet her, feed her, and watch her grow from kitten to adult. She reacts gently to your active tab and never sends your data anywhere.
featuresTitle: Company in the tabs you already have
featuresLead: Moods, care moments, and a cat who remembers places you visit together.
featureFloatingBody: Tabby appears on the pages you visit. Drag her anywhere you like.
featureCareBody: Tap to pet, feed, play, or ask what is up. She answers in a speech bubble.
featureFeedingBody: Short treat scenes when her belly is empty and you share a snack.
featurePlayBody: Wind her up with play time. She has moods that match the moment.
featurePeekBody: She may wander in from the edge or whisper a silly line while you browse.
featureGrowBody: Newborn kitten, playful teen, then adult cat over real calendar weeks.
showcaseTitle: She feels the vibe of your browsing
showcaseBody: Tabby shifts mood from the title and web address of your active tab, nothing more. Busy evening? Snooze her. Quiet page? She might peek in with a hungry grumble or a goofy line.
showcaseCaption: Tap her anytime for the care menu
privacyPoint1: Reads only the active tab title and web address
privacyPoint2: Never reads page body text or browsing history
privacyCtaLead: Ready for a co-pilot with whiskers?
